method.conditions: 0.2 g 3-pyridylboronic acid in 20 mL deionized water; N2 bubbling for 1 h; sealed Teflon-lined reactor; 160 °C for 8 h

applications.performance: linear relationship of 80-4000μM, with a limit of detection of 54μM (S/N=3)
applications.comparative_advantage: high selectivity for SA, shorter obtaination time

feedback.label: Bad
